name: grpcui

preferences.name: terminal
preferences.title: Terminal
preferences.description: Which terminal to use for launching gRPC UI

title: gRPC UI
description: Quickly launch gRPC UI for your saved services directly from Raycast.
author: loqa-s

commands.name: list-services
commands.title: Search Services
commands.description: Browse and launch your saved gRPC services

commands.name: add-service
commands.title: Add Service
commands.description: Add a new gRPC service to your list

commands.name: import-services
commands.title: Import Services
commands.description: Import multiple gRPC services from a JSON file

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
